name: rasa-html-example
description: This repository provides an example of how to integrate and use a Rasa chatbot widget built with StencilJS in a simple HTML project.

scripts.sync:widget: cd ../.. && npm run -w packages/ui build && rm -rf examples/html/rasa-chatwidget && cp -R packages/ui/dist/rasa-chatwidget examples/html/rasa-chatwidget
